arts.ttl: Monchi speaks out on Aston Villa future amid Sevilla question
arts.sum: Monchi has once again brushed off suggestions that he could return to Spain in the near future, admitting that he feels loved at Aston Villa. I miss many things about Spain, but right now my happiness is comparable to Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: ‘End of story’ – Aston Villa player ‘has to leave’ in summer, making it easy for director
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Leander Dendoncker was unable to enjoy regular minutes after Unai Emery took charge at Villa Park in November 2022. The Premier League club sent the 29-year-old on loan to Napoli and then to Anderlecht, who have an option to buy him for €7m in the summer. arts.sum: Samuel Iling-Junior has impressed Middlesbrough manager Michael Carrick playing a new position Not sure where his best role was, the versatile forward had played left and right wing under Michael Carrick before finding his feet in a completely new position.

arts.ttl: Watkins starts, Rashford decision: Aston Villa starting XI vs Brighton predicted
arts.sum: Aston Villa return to Premier League action on Wednesday night as Unai Emery’s side take on Brighton at the Amex. Predicted Villa XI: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Mings, Digne, Kamara, Tielemans, Rogers, Asensio, Rashford, Watkins.

arts.ttl: Manager demanded sign Brighton player during conversations – ‘Dropped’ another target
arts.sum: Napoli signed Billy Gilmour from Brighton in the summer transfer window. The Scotsman made a slow start to life in Italy but in the past few weeks, his prominence under Antonio Conte has grown. He has made 18 appearances in Serie A and Gilmour has started all of Napoli’s last four league games.
